推荐场景: 圆桌访谈｜理解/回应反方观点
60秒任务: 「反方观点」：问题/观点/例子/总结；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 访谈｜观点展开｜例证｜反方观点｜总结｜态度识别
场景族: 新闻短片｜播客访谈｜公共广播｜活动现场｜屏幕公告
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Some people would argue that ___.（引入反方）
The counterargument is that ___.（提出反方论点）
I understand that concern.（承认担忧）
That’s a serious point, but ___.（回应反方）
Critics might say ___.（呈现批评）
We shouldn’t ignore the other side.（平衡讨论）
There’s some truth in that.（有限承认）
However, it doesn’t fully address ___.（指出不足）
A fair objection would be ___.（合理异议）
The question is whether ___.（提出判断点）
I don’t think the evidence supports that.（证据反驳）
That view assumes ___.（指出假设）
It may be partly true, but ___.（部分承认后转折）
Let’s compare both arguments.（比较论点）
Where do the two sides actually agree?（寻找共识）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: counterargument, critic, objection, evidence, assumption, concern, argument, agreement
Verbs: argue, object, assume, support, address, compare, ignore, agree
Adjectives / Tone: serious, fair, partial, reasonable, unsupported, one-sided
Time / Place: on the other side, in public debate, in the report, during the interview
Chunks: some people argue, there’s some truth, partly true, both arguments, other side
